About
Talk to an engineer

Service Model

Expert engineers behind every alert

SAM4 isn't self-serve software. Behind the platform is a team of reliability engineers who know your fleet, your sites, and your maintenance priorities. Every AI-flagged anomaly is reviewed by a human before it reaches you.

What you get

A team, not just a tool

Every SAM4 subscription includes three pillars of human support. These aren't add-ons. They're built into the service from day one.

Dedicated diagnostics team

Reliability engineers with domain expertise across pumps, compressors, fans, and motors. They've analysed thousands of faults across dozens of industries. Every AI-flagged anomaly is reviewed: fault type confirmed, severity assessed, recommended action written, time-to-failure estimated. Your team receives validated insights — not raw alerts to triage.

Named customer success manager

One person who knows your fleet, your sites, and your maintenance priorities. They coordinate onboarding, manage escalations, track detection outcomes, and ensure you're extracting full value from the platform. When you call, you speak to someone who already knows what's happening on your assets.

Quarterly business reviews

Scheduled reviews covering detection outcomes, fleet health trends, asset prioritisation recommendations, and ROI tracking. Data formatted for leadership — including avoided downtime, energy savings, and maintenance cost impact. No reformatting required.

Getting started

We guide every step

Deploying condition monitoring usually means months of planning. SAM4 is different. We guide you from asset selection through go-live and beyond — with a named contact at every stage.

1

Asset selection

We help you identify which assets to monitor first — based on criticality, failure history, and accessibility. Not every motor needs monitoring. We help you prioritise the ones where early detection has the highest impact.

2

Installation + onboarding

Hardware installs at the MCC in under 60 minutes per asset. Your fleet appears in the dashboard the same day. We handle configuration, baseline calibration, and initial health assessment.

3

Training

Structured training for every user role. Your maintenance team learns to interpret alerts, act on recommendations, and track outcomes. Operations directors learn to use fleet-level views and reporting. We train to your workflow, not ours.

4

Ongoing support

A named customer success manager for escalations, quarterly reviews, and continuous improvement. New assets can be added at any time. As your fleet grows, the service scales with it.

Why it matters

This isn't self-serve software

Most predictive maintenance tools hand you a dashboard and leave you to figure it out. SAM4 works differently.

Human-verified alerts

Every anomaly is reviewed by a reliability engineer before it reaches your team. No false alarm fatigue. No alert noise to filter through.

Actionable recommendations, not raw data

You receive a fault type, severity, recommended action, and estimated time to failure. Not a waveform chart you need a PhD to interpret.

No in-house vibration expertise required

Samotics provides the analytical capability. Your maintenance team focuses on execution — scheduling repairs, not interpreting signals.

ROI tracking built in

Quarterly business reviews quantify avoided downtime, maintenance savings, and energy reduction. You don't build the business case — we help you maintain it.

400×400 Service model illustration Diagram showing: AI detection → Engineer review → Validated alert → Your team acts. Circular flow with human-in-the-loop highlighted.

See exactly what's involved. We'll scope your MCC, asset list, and timeline.

Start your asset audit Schedule a technical deep-dive

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
